SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
AdminController
Controller for the admin management screen.
Album
Model class representing an album containing photos.
AlbumController
Controller for the user's album list screen.
AlbumList
Model class representing a collection of albums for a user.
AlbumListHelper
Utility class for saving and loading AlbumList objects to and from disk.
LoginController
Controller for the login screen.
Photo
Model class representing a Photo in an album.
PhotoController
Controller for a photo album view.
Photos
Main application class for the Photos program.
PhotoViewController
Controller for the photo viewer window.
Tag
Represents a tag on a photo, consisting of a tag name and a tag value.
UserList
Model class representing the list of users in the application (excluding the admin user).
UserListHelper
Utility class for saving and loading the UserList to and from disk.
